programme.title: Jon Richardson: Old Man Tour
programme.desc: Comedian Jon Richardson brings his sell-out live show to Blackpool's historic Grand Theatre, sharing his hilarious observations on daily life, from haircuts to crimes against dishwashing.

programme.title: New: Piers Morgan: Uncensored
programme.desc: The bold, opinion-led news and debate show hosted by Piers Morgan. Piers blends journalism, debates and cultural commentary that's unapologetically direct.

programme.title: Georgie & Mandy's First Marriage
programme.desc: Mandy tries to prove she's financially responsible after being called out on her poor spending habits, and Connor's girlfriend needs a place to stay. S1/Ep18

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: TV's most daring dating show. Pansexual Izzy is open to all genders. Dom's looking for a woman who isn't put off by his posh boy charm. (S2 Ep1/5)

programme.title: Apocalypse Now
programme.desc: Final cut of Coppola's award-laden take on the Vietnam War, with Martin Sheen and Marlon Brando. An assassin travels upriver to terminate a renegade colonel with extreme prejudice.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: A look at how products are made. Featuring how leather is produced, how goods are moved down the Grand Canal and how Flyboard is created. S10/Ep20

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 38-year-old has life-threatening injuries after a wall falls on him at work. Seven-year-old Layla-Rose has smashed her front teeth. And a motocross rider has crashed his bike.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a student's school reports a girl missing, the squad must track down a trusted family friend for answers. Benson gets a Mother's Day surprise. (S23 Ep20)

programme.title: Skin A&E
programme.desc: Dr Dev Shah treats a Nottingham Forest fan with a large head cyst, and Dr Toby Nelson deals with a series of mini lipomas that look like a string of pearls. (S5 Ep10)

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Scully and Mulder investigate a possible UFO crash site which Mulder believes the government is trying to cover up. (S1 Ep10)

programme.title: New: Devil in Disguise: John Wayne Gacy
programme.desc: David: US drama based on real events. Kunkle and Sam are knee-deep in Gacy's trial as the disturbing tale of how he befriended and groomed David Cram is revealed. [S,AD] S1 Ep7

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Ferals confront a gold thief who's raided their lease. The Gold Retrievers explore a promising new lease, while Jacqui and Andrew get their big break. S7/Ep10

programme.title: Judge Rinder's Crime Stories
programme.desc: An 11-year-old boy goes missing near his home in Newcastle. Plus, a vulnerable young woman puts her trust in the wrong man. S4/Ep8

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Mississippi...
programme.desc: ...Adventure. Si and Dave visit the hotbed of Cajun culture in Lafayette, Louisiana. There, the bikers sample crawfish and groove at a jam session. S1/Ep4

programme.title: Help! My House Is Haunted
programme.desc: The team travel to the oldest pub in the New Forest to investigate numerous reports of it being haunted and end up making a shocking discovery. S1/Ep6

programme.title: The Most Embarrassing TV...
programme.desc: ...Moments. Excruciating and hilarious TV moments, including Richard Madeley's infamous impression of Ali G, Tom Cruise's sofa bombing, and an IT worker's legendary 'accidental' news interview.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers hit the couch for more of the biggest and best TV. What do they think this time?

programme.title: Paranormal: Caught On Camera
programme.desc: Beginning in Philadelphia, a mysterious apparition walks across a woman's front lawn. Could it be a spirit from the infamous mental institution that once stood nearby?

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson hosts the quiz where six players race to answer timed questions and hope to win one million pounds, but it all comes down to who's in the Hot Seat at the end.

programme.title: The Wrap With Gillian Joseph
programme.desc: Debate, analysis and insight on the biggest news stories of the day from the UK and around the world.
